name: Upstage Solar Pro 2 (Reasoning)
archDisplay: Dense transformer with switchable Chat / Reasoning (chain-of-thought) inference modes
note: Reasoning-mode CoT variant; Korea's first frontier-ranked model per Upstage/press coverage at July 2025 launch.

results.notes: Artificial Analysis independent evaluation, GPQA Diamond, Solar Pro 2 Reasoning mode.
Artificial Analysis independent evaluation, Humanity's Last Exam, Reasoning mode.
Artificial Analysis independent evaluation, IFBench, Reasoning mode.

verificationNotes: Confirmed the model itself is real (2025-07-10 release, 31B params, Reasoning mode confirmed via Upstage's own launch blog and independent press). However the claimed AA Intelligence Index result (score=15, sourceUrl .../solar-pro-2-reasoning/providers) could NOT be confirmed: the cited /providers sub-page shows no Intelligence Index score at all ('No API providers are currently available'), and the main solar-pro-2-reasoning model page currently shows a score of 9, not 15 (Artificial Analysis Intelligence Index is a live, frequently-recalculated metric, and an earlier press cycle cited 58 under an older methodology — none of these match the claimed 15). Per instructions, dropped this unconfirmed result row rather than keep or silently correct the number; removed the launch-quote 'scored 58... 5 points above GPT-4.1' claim from the note since it could not be tied to a verifiable current source and conflicts with the current index value.
